free_text: Radiative Capture Cross Sections of Neutrons with
Energies 1-50000 eV by Nuclei of V,Zr,Zr-90,Zr-91,
For Zr-90,Zr-91,Zr-94 was Carried Out by Resonance
On Slowing Down Time in Lead with Resolution
30 Per-Cent For E=1 KeV and 70 Per-Cent For Energy
And Some Data-Lines from That Entry Added
Sample with Enrichment 81.3 Per-Cent and Thickness
Data were Similar to Those of 40693007
Reaction Quantity SF6 from SIG to RI
Normalized Using Resonances in Mo and W.
